name: checkmate
description: Draft and QA RFP compliance matrices in Spare's voice, with deterministic per-row precedent lookup built fresh from Spare's past-RFP corpus at the start of every fill. Bundled pure-stdlib MCP server (checkmate-precedents) indexes the per-session corpus and returns TF-IDF-matched precedents for each new requirement, so every answer is sourced in code rather than prose. No shared file, no scheduled rebuild, no stale caches. Forbids no-bid and scope-judgment outputs.
